events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established when the American Consul at Brazzaville, Alan W. Lukens, presented his letter of credence as Chargé d'Affaires.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 13, 1960, when the American Consul at Brazzaville, Alan W. Lukens, presented his letter of credence as Charge d'Affaires.

events.event_description: Embassy Bangui was established with Alan W. Lukens as resident Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Embassy Bangui was established on February 10, 1961, with Alan W. Lukens as resident Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
